title: 15.6 Inch WiFi Digital Photo Frame,1920x1080 IPS HD Touch Screen,64 GB Digital Picture Frame,Auto-Rotate,Wall Mountable,Electronic Photo Frame Share Photos/Videos Instantly via APP
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: Perfect Gift Choice with 64GB Storage: This digital photo frame allows you to preload it with your photos without even opening the package, so your loved ones can enjoy cherished memories the moment they switch it on! With a generous 64GB of storage, you can save thousands of photos without ever needing to delete a precious moment. Additionally, the device supports connection via Micro SD card (not included), providing added flexibility in your media selection

15.6-Inch IPS FHD Touch Screen: The CKypad digital picture frame features a 15.6-inch HD IPS touchscreen with a resolution of 1920×1080 (16:10 aspect ratio), ensuring your photos and videos appear in stunning high definition with rich, vibrant colours. IPS technology provides wide viewing angles and accurate colour reproduction, so every image looks its best from any angle

Instant Photo Sharing via App & Wi-Fi: Share special moments instantly using the "AiMOR" app—no matter the distance! Simply connect the photo frame to Wi-Fi and allow family and friends to send photos remotely (supports JPG, GIF, BMP, PNG, and MP4 formats). With no user limits, everyone can contribute—making it perfect for grandparents, relatives, or long-distance loved ones

Auto-Rotate & Flexible Mounting Options: Display the electronic photo frame in landscape or portrait mode—the smart auto-rotate feature adjusts the orientation automatically. Whether placed on a table or mounted on the wall using the included stand and mounting holes, it’s ideal for bedrooms, living rooms, or offices, keeping your memories beautifully showcased

Easy Setup & Intuitive Touch Controls: Designed with simplicity in mind, the responsive touchscreen lets you adjust brightness, slideshow speed, and layout in just a few taps. Even less tech-savvy users can easily manage photo settings, hide or show the temperature display, or delete images. A stress-free way to relive your favourite moments every day. Ideal for birthdays, Christmas, or anniversaries, it’s a thoughtful gift that keeps memories alive
